examples: The Positron lifetime spectra of unannealed and annealed Ni-coats, electro-plated from the four typical baths, have been measured.
The experimental results indicated that the film resistivity of the sample annealed was reduced significantly and only one 3.17 of the unannealed.
XRD structural analysis shows that peak intensity of the annealed sample is greater than that of the unannealed one which demonstrated an increase of crystallinity.
